summary: Solid unit test suite covering all major functions (manifest parsing, license lookup, status checking, report generation) and key workflows. Well-organized with good fixtures, proper isolation, and clear test names. However, rigor is limited: tests cover happy path and basic error scenarios (missing files, invalid JSON) but lack edge cases such as null/empty policy or database inputs, permission errors, manifests with no dependencies (though one test does cover this), special characters in names/licenses, and boundary conditions on extremely large inputs. The integration testing via test-harness.ps1 adds comprehensive end-to-end validation including exact JSON output matching, which strengthens overall confidence. Would catch most regressions in core functionality but might miss corner cases in error handling paths.
